health.issuesDesc: We found some problems that might affect your users.

empty.noMetricsDesc: Add the tracking snippet to your site to start seeing metrics.
empty.noSessionsDesc: Sessions will appear here when visitors browse your tracked site.
landing.heroSubtitle: Know exactly what's happening on your website. Session recordings, smart alerts, and performance insights — built for Ethiopian businesses.
landing.problemTitle: Your website has problems you can't see
landing.problem1Desc: Broken buttons, confusing navigation, and errors your users never report.
landing.problem2Desc: Visitors leave your site without buying, signing up, or contacting you.
landing.problem3Desc: Pages that take too long to load on Ethiopian mobile networks.
landing.featureTitle: Everything you need to understand your users
landing.feature1Desc: Watch exactly what your users do — every click, scroll, and page visit.
landing.feature2Desc: Get notified on Telegram when users struggle or your site slows down.
landing.feature3Desc: Track Core Web Vitals and page load speed across all devices.
landing.step1Desc: One line of code. Works with any website.
landing.step2Desc: Real-time sessions, heatmaps, and performance metrics.
landing.step3Desc: We catch issues automatically so you can fix them fast.
landing.trust1Desc: Full Amharic interface — no translation needed.
landing.trust2Desc: Lightweight SDK designed for Ethiopian mobile networks.
landing.trust3Desc: Data stored securely. No sharing with third parties.
